name: Wealthville
description: Liquidity-pool intelligence for DeFi agents: Enter/Hold/Exit verdicts, composite 0-100 Wealthville Scores for Solana + EVM pools, and a public miss-inclusive track record.

optionalSecrets.name: WEALTHVILLE_API_KEY
optionalSecrets.description: Free partner key for a higher rate limit (anonymous works at 60 req/min). Get one at https://wealthville.net/developers

WEALTHVILLE_API_URL.description: Override the API base URL (default https://wealthville.net)
